subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-04-26
subcodes.first_line: There were 60 stages from Bagdad to Samsun and the trip was made under the most difficult circumstances. It was a time of famine
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @business; financial; property matters, @personal instructions
